Package pl.AWTGameEngine.components.base

Class ObjectComponent

java.lang.Object
pl.AWTGameEngine.components.base.ObjectComponent
Direct Known Subclasses:
Animator, Border, BoxSpawner, Button, CameraFollow, Canvas, Collider, CustomComponent, Filter, FlexDisplay, ForceTest, FPSMeter, GameView, GameViewHook, HTMLComponent, Joint, LineComponent, MenuBar, MovementGL, MusicPlayer, NetComponent, NetLauncher, NetRelayLauncher, ParticleEmitter, PlayerController, ProjectManager, RigidBody, ScrollCameraBind, ScrollComponent, SoundSource, SpinningObject, StateSaverTest, Test2DForce, TextArea, TextRenderer3D, Vehicle, Vehicle.Engine, Vehicle.Gearbox, Vehicle.Wheel, VehicleSteer, WebHandler, WebTextArea
public abstract class ObjectComponent extends Object

      Method is called before frame draw. PreUpdate is called first.

      Method is called before frame draw. Update is called after PreUpdate.

    • onUpdatePosition

      public boolean onUpdatePosition(double newX, double newY)
      Method is called when X or Y of object is changed.
      Returns:
      True when position can be updated. Return false to cancel position update.
